title: dicerandra frutescens subsp. savannarum
intro: Dicerandra frutescens subsp. savannarum, commonly known as Sawarrow or Sawarrow root, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as relieving menstrual cramps and other digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Dicerandra frutescens subsp. savannarum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use and availability may vary depending on the region and local regulations.
